query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod, u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL as hasPassword, tm.tenantId FROM users u LEFT JOIN tenantMembers tm ON u.id = tm.userId ORDER BY u.id
